## MAR-1145 traceability checklist
- [ ] Branch name follows `mar-<issue-number>-<short-kebab-scope>`
- [ ] Commit subjects start with `MAR-<number>:`
- [ ] Commit bodies include `Issue: MAR-<number>`
- [ ] This PR is required under MAR-1145 Section 5 or exception is documented
- [ ] Closeout comment will include branch, commit(s), PR id/link, final merge id

## Verification
- [ ] Baseline CI is green
- [ ] Scope remains issue-local and atomic
